description: Ruby on Rails invariants: no interpolated SQL fragments, no blanket mass-assignment, html_safe under review. Parameterized `where("name = ?", n)` and hash conditions are untouched.

rules.message: Ruby #{...} interpolated into a SQL fragment — use bound parameters (where("col = ?", v)) or hash conditions
params.permit! whitelists EVERYTHING (mass-assignment) — permit the explicit attribute list instead
html_safe marks the string trusted and skips escaping — confirm the content cannot carry user input, or sanitize() it first
